62.reason: [Error: When aim equals point->num, the node is not inserted. According to problem definition (right child >= root), duplicates should be placed in the right subtree, not ignored.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  This break causes duplicate values to be ignored (not inserted), but the problem requires right child >= root, so duplicates should be inserted into the right subtree. This leads to missing leaf nodes like 100.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  This handles duplicate values by simply breaking, but the problem requires that duplicates go to the right (>=). This causes the duplicate 100 to be ignored, so it never appears as a leaf.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Incorrect: duplicate values (equal to current node) should be inserted to the right subtree, not discarded.
